name: HYTE X50 ATX Mid-Tower Computer Case - Astral Orange - 4mm Thick Laminated Acoustic Glass - Full-Coverage Micro-Mesh Panels - 1x USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 Type-C - 2x USB 3.2 Gen 1x1 Type-A - 3.5mm Audio Combo Jack - Magnetic Dust Filters (CS-HYTE-X50G-AO)
shortName: HYTE X50 ATX Mid-Tower Computer Case - Astral Orange - 4mm Thick
description: Mid-tower ATX case with acoustic glass panels and micro-mesh design, ideal for noise reduction and sleek aesthetics.

specs.usb_ports: 1x USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 Type-C, 2x USB 3.2 Gen 1x1 Type-A
